images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful young Japanese female model with the allure of a top-tier gravure idol, captured walking away on a sunlit yacht deck, her silhouette framed by a fusion of Victorian brass fixtures and modern neon sign lighting casting a vibrant, clear glow that eliminates heavy shadows. She wears a sheer, intricately lace-trimmed cover-up over a form-fitting bikini, the sheer fabric teasingly revealing the curve of her slim waist and supple skin texture with faint vellus hair. In a cozy and intimate mood, she casually tows a vintage-styled skateboard by her side, turning her head slightly back to reveal an innocent, wide-eyed gaze that locks onto the viewer. The background is a blurred seascape of gold and azure, captured with a Fujifilm simulation color grade, shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, featuring depth of field, ray tracing, and global illumination.8k photo, Large breasts, deep cleavage, ample cleavage, sexy photo, beautilful girl without makeup
